goal: Align the LLM-facing project context with the current final-program development state so future work starts from the real v0 closeout position: FE v6 is applied, M0-M6 local evidence is present, and release remains NOT_GO only until real trained adapter no-fake endpoint evidence is supplied.
head: 69d7a9f
blocked_scope: Changing verifier acceptance policy or weakening release gates
Editing M6 review docs to GO
Creating or committing model weights, adapters, Docker images, endpoint transcripts, copied external evidence bundles, or GO release evidence
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may update LLM-facing CONTEXT/WORKING state docs, refresh current NOT_GO v0 readiness, and update this PABCD contract only.
required_evidence: docs/CONTEXT.md no longer instructs future agents to start from stale M1-only/product_code_started_false state
docs/CONTEXT.md identifies FE v6 mockup application as verified and points to the v6 mockup/evidence
docs/CONTEXT.md identifies current v0 readiness as expected NOT_GO with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the only release blocker
Current v0 readiness verification remains expected NOT_GO with no unexpected blockers
warnings: M6-RC and v0 remain NOT_GO until real trained CUDA adapter no-fake Docker endpoint evidence exists.
This gate updates LLM-facing state docs only and does not edit release review docs or verifier acceptance criteria.

phase_notes.plan: Replace stale LLM startup context with the current v0 closeout state and explicit remaining release blocker.
phase_notes.audit: Current CONTEXT still describes M1 startup/product_code_started false, while WORKING and readiness evidence show FE v6 verified and v0 closeout blocked only by real adapter endpoint evidence.
phase_notes.build: Updated docs/CONTEXT.md and docs/WORKING.md to guide future LLMs from the current v0 closeout state without changing SSOT or release policy.
phase_notes.check: JSON contract, rg evidence, v0 readiness expected NOT_GO, json.tool, m1-smoke bootstrap, git diff --check, and git diff --cached --check passed.
phase_notes.done: Phase verified. LLM context now points to FE v6 evidence, current closeout tooling, and the real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint release blocker instead of stale M1 startup instructions.

pabcd.approved_scope: LLM-facing CONTEXT/WORKING state alignment, refreshed current NOT_GO v0 readiness, and PABCD contract only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product code changes, no verifier acceptance weakening, no M6 GO doc edits, no adapter/model/Docker evidence commits, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
